name: Ravager
description: A brutal explosive shotgun built for point-blank fights. Its pellets and splash can erase targets at close range, especially larger enemies that can catch the full spread, but the slow fire rate and 4-shell cost make every shot expensive. Past close range it becomes much less reliable unless you can lead targets well enough to land multiple pellets.
notes: Random world drop. The card damage underrates it because the explosive bonus is not reflected properly. It only spawns at blue rarity or higher. Krieg skills may trigger differently depending on whether the kill comes from pellet damage, splash, or both. Gaige's Close Enough can ricochet pellets so they detonate at range. Salvador's Keep Firing... helps offset the low fire rate and slow reload, and Claptrap's One Last Thing lines up well with the small magazine.
